name: Five9 skill clone & user migration
description: Clone Five9 skills from a template and optionally reassign agents via CSV (source_skill → target_skill).
purpose: Bulk-create similar skills (e.g. IB_ENG_[STATE]_TV) and move users off old skills using the app Admin UI or POST /api/five9/skills/migrate.

authoring.notes: CSV format documented in repo docs/SKILL_MIGRATION_CSV.md. Operations: getSkillInfo, createSkill, getUsersGeneralInfo, getUserInfo, userSkillRemove, userSkillAdd.
